name: Cold Cherry Soup- Meggy Leves Tspn00b
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 2 pounds of fresh, pitted cherries in a saucepan with approximately 1 1/2 cups of cold water or enough to cover the cherries. Add sugar and lemon.
2. For canned cherries: Put canned cherries with liquid from the can into the saucepan. Simmer for 5 minutes (canned) or until hot, or 10 minutes (fresh) until softened. Add sugar and lemon.
3. Stir together cornstarch and sour cream. Pour the mixture over the hot cherries. Return to heat and stir until well combined and thickened. Do not boil after adding sour cream.
4. Cool and chill the soup. Adjust sweetness with additional sugar and lemon juice, if desired. Serve chilled.
